word: G1930 - ἐπιδιορθόω - epidiorthóō - ep-ee-dee-or-tho'-o - Set in order

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Set in order
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to set in order besides or further
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1909 and a derivative of G3717; to straighten further, that is, (figuratively) arrange additionally: - set in order.
